notebooks.title: Welcome to ironpad
notebooks.description: Learn the basics: data flow, typed variables, and SVG charts with plotters.

notebooks.title: Async & HTTP
notebooks.description: Make HTTP requests from Rust cells using async/await.

notebooks.title: Interactive Tutorial
notebooks.description: A step-by-step introduction to ironpad features.

notebooks.title: Charts with Plot
notebooks.description: Create line, bar, and scatter charts with the built-in Plot helper.

notebooks.title: Working with JSON
notebooks.description: Pretty-print and explore JSON data with syntax-highlighted output.

notebooks.title: Interactive Widgets
notebooks.description: Build a reactive tip calculator using all six widget types: slider, dropdown, number, switch, text input, and checkbox.

notebooks.title: Shared Code
notebooks.description: Define reusable helper functions in a shared module accessible from every cell.

notebooks.title: Interactive Button
notebooks.description: Use a button widget to trigger downstream computation on demand with a slider input.

notebooks.title: Progress Bar Demo
notebooks.description: Create a progress bar and update it in real time from a downstream cell using ProgressHandle.
